programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.desc: Teleradyo Program

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E307 - Patty-Poo / Swaptoberfest
programme.desc: Patrick spawns an adorable mini-Patrick who quickly becomes the star of the show (until he outgrows the role). // The Star family celebrates the Klopnodian holiday Swaptoberfest by swapping identities with each other.

programme.title: E109 - No Friend In Sight
programme.desc: Chloe feels smothered by Max and Phoebe, and encourages them to make new friends. However, the twins unwittingly make the same friend, and begin a battle for the ages over her. Chloe's new alone time is interrupted by living room-crashing pelican.

programme.title: E210 - iKiss
programme.desc: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: E220 - Judge Lay Lay
programme.desc: The Alexander family looks to Lay Lay to cast the deciding vote on family decisions, but the newfound power goes to her head, and one ruling causes a rift between her and Sadie.

programme.title: E202 - Intern for the Worse
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip’s and compete to win the manager title.

programme.title: E602 - Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lola and Lana take on Cheryl and Meryl to be crowned the new twin spokespeople for Auntie Pam's Parlor.

programme.title: E206 - The Rejects
programme.desc: When Leo, Mikey, and Raph are captured by the mad scientist Jordan Perry and his Monster Mutanimals, Donnie must stop a mutant invasion on Staten Island and save everyone from the terrifying creation known as Mutant Omega!

programme.title: E711 - Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Woods when their team gets sponsored by local businesses.

programme.title: E277 - Captain Pipsqueak
programme.desc: Plankton joins the League of E.V.I.L.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer / Bean Dreams
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet. // Lori explores a potential career path after her boss suggests she has a strong future within the Burnt Bean organization.

programme.title: E703 - Candy Crushed
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar.

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves.

programme.title: E19 - Fig
programme.desc: It's the nicest, kindest, Fig, performing his song, 'Just Can't Help Being Sweet!'

programme.title: E18 - Apple
programme.desc: Apple sings in celebration of her great-great-grandad, Apple Tree's, 100th birthday.

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E24 - Crafty Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a monster costume in the craft aisle to scare the Tato Team out of the supermarket, but Supertato wants to be the monster's friend.

programme.title: E119 - Hidey Hup
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They enjoy going on the Tubby Bouncy, the Tubby Uppy Downy, the Tubby Spinny and the Tubby Slidey.

programme.title: E13 - Slippers
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'slippers' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. This episode is all about slippers - green slippers, blue slippers, little slippers and big slippers.

programme.title: E17 - Messy Breaks The Brakes
programme.desc: Messy accidentally removes the brakes from Mayor Oki's carnival float, but it turns out he really needs them. Will Messy be able to stop the runaway float?

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E3 - The Transport Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee's old friend Rhodri goes home after a visit, he forgets his favourite hat. The Squirrels take an epic journey to give it back.

programme.title: E25 - Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E24 - Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: E27 - Seesaw
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: E50 - The Key Badge
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error.

programme.title: E49 - The Sailing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are enjoying a day at the beach, when they encounter the Penguins who explain they were on a very important mission when they got sick.

programme.title: E10 - Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic.

programme.desc: When JoJo learns that Jared was too busy to have a birthday party, Gran Gran has a Gran Gran Plan to throw Jared a surprise belated birthday party!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in!

programme.title: E3 - Burmese Pythons
programme.desc: If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the 'Glades, the hunter has become the hunted as Dusty 'Wildman' Crum has made it his mission to eradicate this species. Luckily for Yia, python is considered a delicacy in many countries, and Dusty believes these constrictors should be restricted to life on a plate, which helps take a bite out of the problem.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E11 - Horns Up
programme.desc: Billy and his partner Shaun respond to a frat house where an animal prank is no longer funny. Then Billy saves a family from an infestation of flying squirrels.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E11 - Horns Up
programme.desc: Billy and his partner Shaun respond to a frat house where an animal prank is no longer funny. Then Billy saves a family from an infestation of flying squirrels.

programme.title: E5 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E4 - Sturts Steps

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they’ve ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs and relaxing in a boiling hot spring, nothing can prepare the duo for the ending of their trip heading to the demilitarized zone to detonate bombs. After this trip to Vietnam, what more heart-racing adventures and Rooftop and Catfish possibly find?

programme.title: E3 - Burmese Pythons
programme.desc: If you asked experts what the most prevalent predator species in the United States is, without hesitation, the answer would be the Burmese pythons in the Florida Everglades. Growing up to 26-feet long and weighing as much as 200 pounds, the Burmese python has completely altered the ecosystem of the Everglades by eliminating over 99% of the native mammal population. To save the 'Glades, the hunter has become the hunted as Dusty 'Wildman' Crum has made it his mission to eradicate this species. Luckily for Yia, python is considered a delicacy in many countries, and Dusty believes these constrictors should be restricted to life on a plate, which helps take a bite out of the problem.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E2 - From Mail To Outer Space!
programme.desc: Blippi is on adventures big & small, from the mail to outer space! First, Blippi shrinks down to go inside the BlippiMobile's engine to fix a problem. Then, he follows a letter he wrote on its entire journey through the post office to Grandpa Blippi’s mailbox! After that, he flies into outer space on a rocket, floating in zero gravity & performing a space walk. He even joins a boulder on its exciting trip down a river to become a grain of sand!

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E4 - Nina’s Football Dream!
programme.desc: Join Nina as she imagines being a soccer superstar in the World Cup! Help her race against friends, lead her family in a fun-filled day of soccer and games, and learn to drive a tractor on Grandpa's farm. With Nina, every day is an adventure!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!

E18 - Jean-Rony Leriche
programme.desc: The Guadeloupe-born chef Jean-Rony Leriche has settled in Paris. Initially a pastry chef, he later set himself the mission of showcasing Caribbean and Haitian cuisine in his fine-dining restaurant. On today's menu: a plate of lambis, the iconic Caribbean shellfish, served with boiled bananas.

programme.title: E1 - Daring To Go Offshore/An Art Of Freedom
programme.desc: Join Matthieu Fournier as he follows windsurfing champion Pauline Katz, then returns to Switzerland to showcase the breathtaking work of Francois Staub, a high-end cabinetmaker driven by freedom.

programme.title: E1 - Benjamin Vedrines, The Mountaineer Of Every Exploit
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the Ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: E109
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E3 - The Titan Games Trials 3
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: American Dreams in China
programme.desc: 80's. 3 undergraduates share a common ambition - to live the American dream. They establish a tutorial school New Vision, yet the sudden fame are tearing their friendship apart...

programme.title: Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: DONG JI ISLAND follows the tragic tale of a Japanese warship secretly transporting British prisoners of war and mistakenly attacked near the easternmost waters of China. To rescue the desperately trapped prisoners, a group of courageous islanders embark on a perilous journey against all odds to the sinking ship, facing relentless Japanese soldiers and the harsh, unforgiving seas...

programme.title: Triangle
programme.desc: Life has not been kind to Sam, Fai and Mok as they struggle to make ends meet. Routine visits to bars seem to be their only way out of miseries. Until a stormy evening when a mysterious old man appears before them with a tip: An ancient treasure is buried under the high-security Legislative Building. All they have to do is sneak in and retrieve it; if they believe in his story. Sam, Fai and Mok agree to make a run for the treasure to test their fate. What they uncover is beyond anything they expected: An ancient coffin containing a ceremonial robe made of gold...

programme.title: The Apartment with Two Women
programme.desc: Yi-jung lives with her mother Su-kyung, but they do not get along well with each other. While out grocery shopping one day, they fight as usual and Su-kyung's car ends up hitting Yi-jung in the parking lot. Yi-jung does not believe Su-kyung's claim that the car suddenly accelerated on its own and thinks her mother hit her on purpose. Now, Yi-jung wants an apology from Su-kyung for everything that happened in her life.

programme.title: Love, Life and Goldfish
programme.desc: Makoto Kashiba is angry and depressed after losing his job as an elite banker and being sent to the countryside. By chance (Or is it fate?) he meets a beautiful girl, Kitsuno. However, the man she's in love with is master pianist and goldfish catcher, Noboru Oji. Bonds between them form, and a love triangle begins...

programme.title: Life Without Principle
programme.desc: “Life Without Principle” tells the story of three ordinary citizens, bank teller Teresa, triad thug Panther and Police inspector Cheung Jin Fong, whose lives are turned upside down by a bizarre robbery. Hammered by the predicaments of their respective lives, what are their choices between money and principles?

programme.desc: The Blood Diamond once belonged to Panembahan Adam, the sultan of Banjarmasin (South Kalimantan).

programme.desc: This time, the two travelers head to Clark, a city emerging as a popular family travel destination.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

E1 - January-February - the Year Begins
programme.desc: In the early months of the year, the Earth’s axial tilt brings the height of summer in some places and the depths of winter in others. See how life struggles to survive under these extreme conditions.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn
programme.desc: As fall sweeps across America and trees are set ablaze with color, animals are faced with make-or-break decisions. Find out how bald eagles, beavers, and other creatures prepare for the colder, darker, and leaner months ahead.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: E1 - January-February - the Year Begins

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Winter is the ultimate challenge for wildlife across America. Will they escape to milder southern climates or stay put and tough out the season? See how different creatures respond to the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E4 - Winter
programme.desc: Winter is the ultimate challenge for wildlife across America. Will they escape to milder southern climates or stay put and tough out the season? See how different creatures respond to the brutal cold and blizzards that blanket the North.

programme.title: E2 - Sanctuary of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: On Africa's east coast, the warm Agulhas run south with a distinctive subtropical landscape. Made up of everything from mangrove swamps to colorful coral reefs, the area has marine turtles - who breed on long and warm sandy beaches - and a recently found population of 'living fossils', the Coelacanth, which dwell in deep, submarine canyons.

programme.title: E18 - Chrissie And Jamie
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: In traditional Taiwanese cuisine, pig liver was regarded as a luxurious ingredient used in nutrition-boosting dishes. Legendary Chef A-fa showcases the gastronomic potential of pig liver.

programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: E1 - Our Own Personal Troubles
programme.desc: Henri and Myrlande, Quebeckers of Haitian origin and parents of three children, see themselves offered new career prospect. But will they be brave enough to make their dreams come true?

programme.title: E2 - Take My Hand Lord
programme.desc: Myrlande, who has to defend a member of the local mafia, decides to delay announcing her career change when Father Moses invites her to be the honorary sponsor of the local community fair.

programme.desc: Petanque has many enthusiasts in Switzerland. In Geneva, the bowling grounds are historic, such as the one in Les Cropettes, where people from all walks of life gather for the love of the game.

programme.title: E6 - 霸總用爆燈搶心儀求職者
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E21 - 科學減重更健康 (上)
programme.desc: 全新研發的大型互動健康科普節目；從「重治療」到「重預防」，加大醫療健康知識的深度普及，把權威的資訊送到身邊。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E6 - 畫風不同的兩個爸爸討論帶娃經驗
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: A True Mob Story
programme.desc: Cheung Dee, together with his best friends Long Life Chuen and Holy Sand, set up a valet parking counter outside a restaurant owned by a triad society he affiliates with. By accident, Cheung finds out that the son of his triad head, Tai Tze, is fiercely attacked by Song Bo. To save Tai's life, Cheung attacks Song and not only leaves a scar on Song's face, but also puts him in jail for five years which plants a seed of the revenge five years later. Form that moment, the only person that can cheer him up is his best girl friend Ruby. Yet, Cheung has his heart on Sandy, a young solicitor who helped set him free in an assault case. No sooner has their love relationship developed than Cheung's nightmare has begun......

programme.title: Farewell My Dearest
programme.desc: The film was set in the 1970s, Dai Cheng-wah was a top law student in the University of Hong Kong. He fell in love with an orphan Suk-fun. His father opposed this relationship. The lovers eventually got married and Suk-fun dropped out of school because of pregnancy. Cheng-wah continued his studies and graduated. Under his father's influence, he was only able to work in a shabby law firm. After Suk-fun gave birth to triplets, Cheng-wah had a heavy burden. Finally, Cheng-wah won lawsuit and gained fame. However, Suk-fun suddenly discovered she had terminal illness...

programme.title: Legacy Of Rage
programme.desc: Brandon Ma, a regular guy working in Hong Kong, who is set up by his drug-dealing best friend Michael, to take the rap for the murder of an undercover cop. Michael also has eyes for Brandon's girl, May. While Brandon languishes in jail, May gives birth to their child and flees to Brazil to avoid the lurid clutches of Michael, who has become a big crime boss. Brandon gets out of prison after eight years, learns the truth, and goes after Michael for revenge...

programme.title: Long And Winding Road
programme.desc: A story about two different men each finding their true meanings in life. LESLIE and TONY, two lower middle-class bachelors, are bosom friends. Leslie is a wandering soul who seems unable to settle down. He got fired and his girlfriend left him. Tony is a frustrating musician and a part-time worker at an elderly home. He doesn't like old people, but works there only to get close to his dream girl WAI...

programme.title: Stunning Gigi Lai: All's Well, Ends Well 97
programme.desc: Old Mr. Lao has three sons and the youngest one Lao Kung is his favorite. However, Kung does nothing but fool around all day long. Old Mr. Lao is very annoyed about this. The relationship between father and son is thus affected. So on Kung‘s birthday, his two brothers decide to play a joke on him. They trick him into believing he has won the lottery. Kung is so happy that he spends a tremendous amount of money. When he realizes he is in huge debt, he pretends to go insane and the whole family believes him. They take great care of him and confide in him. It is this pretence that makes Kung grows up and he and his father finally end in good terms.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。
